state.output:
<file>
00001| ---
00002| name: farcaster-mini-app
00003| description: Implementation guide for Farcaster Mini Apps (frames v2) with required files, SDK integration, and wallet setup
00004| allowed-agents: ["primary"]
00005| ---
00006| 
00007| **IMPORTANT**: Farcaster Frames v1 are deprecated. Only use Mini Apps (v2) spec.
00008| 
00009| ## Installation
00010| 
00011| ```bash
00012| bun install @farcaster/miniapp-sdk @farcaster/miniapp-wagmi-connector
00013| ```
00014| 
00015| ## Required Files
00016| 
00017| ### 1. `/.well-known/farcaster.json`
00018| 
00019| Complete manifest structure (publishing is handled by VIE platform):
00020| 
00021| ```json
00022| {
00023|   "frame": {
00024|     "version": "1",
00025|     "name": "__APP_NAME__",
00026|     "iconUrl": "__ICON_URL__",
00027|     "homeUrl": "__HOME_URL__",
00028|     "imageUrl": "__IMAGE_URL__"
00029|     // Optional: "splashImageUrl": "URL", "splashBackgroundColor": "#hex"
00030|   }
00031| }
00032| ```
00033| 
00034| ### 2. HTML Meta Tags
00035| 
00036| Add to shareable pages in `<head>`:
00037| 
00038| ```html
00039| <meta name="fc:miniapp" content='{
00040|   "version": "1",
00041|   "imageUrl": "__IMAGE_URL__",
00042|   "button": {
00043|     "title": "__BUTTON_TEXT__",
00044|     "action": {
00045|       "type": "launch_miniapp",
00046|       "name": "__APP_NAME__",
00047|       "url": "__HOME_URL__"
00048|       // Optional in action: "splashImageUrl": "URL", "splashBackgroundColor": "#hex"
00049|     }
00050|   }
00051| }' />
00052| ```
00053| 
00054| **Button title**: Maximum 32 characters
00055| 
00056| ## SDK Integration
00057| 
00058| **CRITICAL**: Call `sdk.actions.ready()` in background to dismiss splash screen. Don't block UI rendering.
00059| 
00060| ```typescript
00061| import { sdk } from '@farcaster/miniapp-sdk'
00062| 
00063| // In root component - call in background, don't await
00064| useEffect(() => {
00065|   sdk.actions.ready().catch(() => {}) // Silent fail for iframe/preview
00066| }, [])
00067| ```
00068| 
00069| **Without this call, users see infinite loading screen.**
00070| 
00071| ## Wallet Integration (Wagmi)
00072| 
00073| **File:** `sandbox/workspace/frontend/src/lib/blockchain/wagmi.ts`
00074| 
00075| 1. Import connector:
00076| ```typescript
00077| import { farcasterMiniApp as miniAppConnector } from '@farcaster/miniapp-wagmi-connector'
00078| ```
00079| 
00080| 2. Add to connectors array (~line 54):
00081| ```typescript
00082| connectors: [injected(), miniAppConnector()]
00083| ```
00084| 
00085| **Note:** Connector auto-connects if user has wallet connected in Farcaster client. Use standard wagmi hooks (`useAccount`, `useConnect`).
00086| 
00087| 
00088| ## Implementation Checklist
00089| 
00090| - [ ] Install packages: `@farcaster/miniapp-sdk` and `@farcaster/miniapp-wagmi-connector`
00091| - [ ] Create `public/.well-known/farcaster.json` manifest file
00092| - [ ] Add `fc:miniapp` meta tag to `index.html` or page layout
00093| - [ ] Call `sdk.actions.ready()` after app loads
00094| - [ ] Add `miniAppConnector()` to wagmi connectors in `src/lib/blockchain/wagmi.ts`
00095| 
00096| ## Common Pitfalls to Avoid
00097| 
00098| 1. **Missing manifest file** - Must create `public/.well-known/farcaster.json` (not root directory)
00099| 2. **Using Frames v1 syntax** - `fc:frame:image`, `fc:frame:button` are deprecated
00100| 3. **Forgetting `sdk.actions.ready()`** - Results in infinite splash screen
00101| 4. **Blocking UI on SDK initialization** - Call in background, show UI immediately
00102| 5. **Wrong manifest version** - Must be `"1"` (string), not `"next"`
00103| 6. **Missing button.action.type** - Must be `"launch_miniapp"`
00104| 
00105| 
00106| ## Placeholder Variables
00107| 
00108| **Set based on context (use actual values):**
00109| - `__APP_NAME__` - Application name based on user's app (max 32 chars)
00110| - `__BUTTON_TEXT__` - CTA text based on app purpose (max 32 chars)
00111| 
00112| **VIE publisher replaces during deployment (use exact placeholders):**
00113| - `__APP_DOMAIN__` - Published domain
00114| - `__ICON_URL__` - Icon URL (1024x1024px PNG)
00115| - `__IMAGE_URL__` - Preview image URL (3:2 aspect ratio)
00116| - `__HOME_URL__` - Launch URL
00117| 
00118| Example `public/.well-known/farcaster.json`:
00119| ```json
00120| {
00121|   "frame": {
00122|     "name": "My Cool NFT App",
00123|     "iconUrl": "__ICON_URL__",
00124|     "homeUrl": "__HOME_URL__"
00125|   }
00126| }
00127| ```
00128| 
00129| ## Additional Resources
00130| 
00131| - Agent checklist: https://miniapps.farcaster.xyz/docs/guides/agents-checklist
00132| - Getting started: https://miniapps.farcaster.xyz/docs/getting-started
00133| - Sharing guide: https://miniapps.farcaster.xyz/docs/guides/sharing
00134| - Wallet integration: https://miniapps.farcaster.xyz/docs/guides/wallets
00135| - Publishing: https://miniapps.farcaster.xyz/docs/guides/publishing
00136| 
00137| 
00138| ## Testing 
00139| 
00140| After publishing app can be tested at https://farcaster.xyz/~/developers/mini-apps/preview
00141| 
00142| 
</file>
